step_rationale: HDL apolipoprotein; altered in plaque rupture; lipid-metabolism marker.
mechanism: Apolipoprotein C mediates lipid metabolism and HDL remodeling; its altered expression during plaque rupture and coronary events reflects changes in lipoprotein turnover.

references.title: Utility of discovery approach using proteomics to create a biomarker profile for coronary microvascular dysfunction.
The human HDL proteome displays high inter-individual variability and is altered dynamically in response to angioplasty-induced atheroma plaque rupture.
